info.description: OpenAPI projection of the food pillar's REST contract. Authored as a ts-rest contract (src/contract/rest.ts); consumed directly by polyglot clients and via openapi-typescript by TS consumers.
info.title: @pops/food

get.summary: Resolve a quantity to its canonical unit

delete.summary: Delete a unit conversion (seeded rows are protected)
Delete an ingredient weight (seeded rows are protected)

get.summary: Search the slug registry by substring, optionally scoped by kind
